positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a forest spirit emerging from stylized roots and glowing flora. The style is a blend of elegant Nordic mythology art and modern linocut woodblock printing. Composition should feature a central, symmetrical arrangement with the spirit partially shrouded in natural elements (mushrooms, intertwined roots, fern fronds). Use a deep color palette of forest emeralds, smoky slate grays, sepia tones, and subtle hints of glowing bioluminescent turquoise accents. The lines must be strong, bold, and graphic, emphasizing clean silhouettes and dramatic contrast suitable for large-scale apparel printing. The background should be solid or minimally patterned to allow for text placement. Clean vector graphic look, highly detailed line art, maximal contrast, centered.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, signature, logo, text, caption, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photographic, photorealism, messy, grunge, gradient, soft focus, realistic, distressed
